form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[预算单号] projectId[项目] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] currencyId[币种] totalAmount[预算总额] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[预算单号] projectId[项目] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] currencyId[币种] totalAmount[预算总额] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[预算单号] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] projectId[项目] businessDate[业务日期]
